parameters.query: INSERT INTO support_tickets (customer_email, subject, body, status, source) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'new', $4) RETURNING id, customer_email, subject, body, source

options.systemMessage: You are a B2B customer support classifier. Respond with valid JSON only.

parameters.query: UPDATE support_tickets SET category = $1, priority = $2, confidence_score = $3, ai_summary = $4, status = $5, assigned_to = $6, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $7 RETURNING id, category, priority
INSERT INTO audit_logs (ticket_id, workflow_step, model_version, input_hash, output_json, execution_time_ms) VALUES ($1, 'classification', $2, $3, $4::jsonb, $5)
